name: @repo/stagger-from-edges
description: A StaggerFromEdges text animation component for SmoothUI.

useCases: Modern product hero typography with edge-to-center convergence
Medium-length word reveal with directional emphasis
Section heading with converging reveal on scroll
compositionHints: Effective for medium word lengths where edge-to-center motion remains readable
Pair with stagger-from-center for alternating reveal patterns
